justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted 'tomorrow' as June 2nd and offered available slots for that day.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully offered relevant alternatives when the user requested an appointment, and the user selected one of the options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently gathered all necessary information and booked the appointment in just two turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth, professional, and directly led to a successful appointment booking, resulting in a positive customer experience.
